name: Maple Tourlouche ( Upside Down Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the maple syrup to a boil and pour it into a generously greased 8-inch square baking dish.
2. Let stand in a warm place.
3. With a large spoon, beat together the butter, sugar, and egg until creamy.
4. Mix the flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg, then add them with the milk to the creamed mixture, stirring until well blended.
5. Place four large balls of the dough into the hot syrup.
6. Using two forks, stretch the dough until all pieces are joined together.
7. If using chopped nuts, add them to the hot syrup.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes. Serve warm with ice cream or whipped cream.
